chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-09 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.02.2025 Petitioner is present in person and his Counsel is called absent. He states that he an old age person and is also mentally disturbed and has no source of income, whereas the learned Trial Court has ordered to pay monthly maintenance of two minors at Rs.8000/- each from November 2024 which he is unable to pay and further states that he was not heard by the learned Court below since he and his Counsel were not present at the time of passing of the Order. On query from the Court, the petitioner undertakes to pay a sum of Rs.5000/- per month from November 2024 for both the children, which according to him is his present ability and requests that he may be allowed to deposit the said amount with the learned Trial Court. As an interim measure and strictly subject to the outcome of this Petition which shall be heard on its own merits and without prejudice to the rights of the Respondent No2. The Petitioner is allowed to deposit Rs.5000/- per month from November 2024 within seven days with the learned Trial Court and shall continue to deposit the same for further future months from today onwards. The Respondent No.2 shall be entitled to withdraw such amounts as and when deposited by the Petitioner, as maintenance of the minors. Adjourned to 14.03.2025 with intimation notices repeated to the Respondent No.2. Copy of this Order to be communicated to the learned Family Judge-VIII, Hyderabad and Report from the said Court be called with respect to meeting of the minors with the Petitioner.

Adjourned to 14.03.2025 with intimation notices repeated to the Respondent No.2. Copy of this Order to be communicated to the learned Family Judge-VIII, Hyderabad and Report from the said Court be called with respect to meeting of the minors with the Petitioner. J U D G E Ali Haider
